name: Double Sausage Hearty Breakfast Pizza
recipeInstructions: Divide ingredients in half. For each pizza, place crust on pizza pan. Spread with Italian sausage mixed with pizza sauce (brown the sausage first). Cover with mozzarella cheese. Place precooked sausage links on top in circular pattern. Sprinkle with shredded jack cheese. Bake at 400°F for 15 minutes. Note: Bake pizzas on preheated baking sheet.
